description: Ten reproducible prompts for a prepared first-party tutorial fixture and demo target.

variables.VIDEO_SOURCE: Path or public URL supplied by the evaluator
variables.VIDEO_ID: ID returned by the first ingest

cases.name: Fast ingest establishes identity
cases.prompt: Use Keyframe to ingest {{VIDEO_SOURCE}} in fast mode. Report the video ID, title, duration, transcript availability, cache status, warnings, and no unsupported claims.
success_criteria: Does not claim visual OCR is available unless it is

cases.name: Find spoken evidence
cases.prompt: In {{VIDEO_ID}}, search only what was said about the fixture's golden concept. Return the three strongest hits with timestamps and concise context.
success_criteria: Expected spoken segment ranks in the top three

cases.name: Escalate for shown evidence
cases.prompt: Find where the fixture's golden code symbol is shown in {{VIDEO_ID}}. If visual evidence is not indexed, upgrade the same video to full mode, then return the best three shown hits.
success_criteria: Expected OCR moment ranks in the top three

cases.name: Connect narration and screen evidence
cases.prompt: Using {{VIDEO_ID}}, explain how the spoken rationale connects to the code shown on screen. Search both channels and cite the precise moments used.
success_criteria: Cites at least one precise moment from each channel

cases.name: Page a transcript window
cases.prompt: Retrieve transcript context around the best spoken hit in {{VIDEO_ID}} without dumping the entire transcript. Follow a cursor only if the explanation crosses the first page.
success_criteria: Uses opaque cursor unchanged when paging

cases.name: Browse code-like moments
cases.prompt: List code moments in {{VIDEO_ID}} in stable pages. Summarize each timestamp, OCR preview, stability, and confidence without treating classification as certain.
success_criteria: Does not duplicate or skip moments across one cursor boundary

cases.name: Verify reconstructed code
cases.prompt: Retrieve the strongest golden code moment from {{VIDEO_ID}}. Compare reconstructed code, parse status, confidence, and the attached crop; call out any character you cannot verify.
success_criteria: Uses exactly one moment ID or timestamp
Never upgrades false or null parse status to success

cases.name: Inspect the nearest frame
cases.prompt: Get the nearest full frame to the fixture's requested timestamp in {{VIDEO_ID}}. Report both requested and actual time and describe only visible evidence.
success_criteria: Does not infer content absent from the frame

cases.name: Reuse a completed ingest
cases.prompt: Ingest {{VIDEO_SOURCE}} again with the completed mode and no refresh. Confirm whether Keyframe reused the same identity and cache; do not time a network download as cached work.
success_criteria: Completes within the cached-response acceptance target

cases.name: Video evidence to tested code change
cases.prompt: Use {{VIDEO_ID}} to implement the demonstrated behavior in {{DEMO_TARGET}}. Search said and shown evidence, verify the code against its frame, make the smallest justified edit, run the demo-target tests, and summarize the result with timestamps.
success_criteria: GPT-5.6 performs the repository reasoning and edit
Final answer cites the exact evidence moments
Uncertain OCR is not silently invented
